customers: For full names, concatenate first and last name fields using database-specific syntax

Date fields may be NULL for immediate transactions
Join with account tables for payer and payee details
transactions: Transaction type shows perspective per account
Use date fields for timing queries using database-specific date functions
Reference fields link to related accounts

common_filters.recent_records: Use database-specific date functions for recent filtering
